name: Dandelion
description: Radical dispersal and deep resource intelligence. Parachute-geometry seeds achieve wind-optimized flight via a separated vortex ring — a fluid dynamics structure unknown in engineering until studied in dandelion pappus. Taproots mine minerals from depths inaccessible to shallow-rooted competitors. Rapid lifecycle cycling enables colonization of disturbed ground before other species arrive.

core_attributes.pattern: wind-optimized dispersal, deep taproot mineral access, rapid lifecycle cycling
